page_content:
Formerly: MUSC699T.

MUSC669 Orchestral Excerpts for String Players (1 Credit)

In-depth study of the orchestral excerpts required for professional orchestra auditions.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC669, MUSC699B, MUSC699L, MUSC699Q, or MUSC699X.
